base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of 20_job_classes — a character from 1997 final fantasy tactics. 20 base-jobs: Squire/Chemist. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 20 base-jobs: Squire/Chemist → Knight/Archer → Monk/White Mage/Black Mage/Priest/Wizard/Time Mage/Summoner → Thief/Oracle/Geomancer/Dragoon/Mediator/Lancer/Samurai/Ninja/Calculator → Arithmetician/Bard/Dancer
